index: Cloudstaff helps US businesses build dedicated offshore teams that cut fully loaded labor costs by up to 80% — with enterprise-grade security, 98% staff retention, and 20+ years of experience.
what-is-remote-staffing: New to outsourcing? Learn what remote staffing is, how it compares to freelancers, PEOs, and BPO, and why US companies use it to scale — explained in plain English.
how-it-works: See exactly how Cloudstaff builds your offshore team: who does what, the 5-step recruitment process, and a 12-month deployment timeline built for controlled growth.
pricing: No hidden fees. See Cloudstaff's three-part pricing model, real monthly costs by role, and how US businesses save up to 80% on fully loaded employment costs.
roles: From accountants and software engineers to customer service and virtual assistants — explore 600+ roles and the industries Cloudstaff serves from global capability hubs.
security: ISO 27001:2022, ISO 9001:2015, SOC 2, HIPAA and GDPR-aligned controls, a 99.9 SecurityScorecard rating, managed devices, and monthly-tested business continuity.
why-cloudstaff: Since 2005, Cloudstaff has built offshore teams for 1,200+ businesses worldwide. Meet the people-first culture, in-house infrastructure, and technology behind the numbers.
cfo-guide: A finance leader's playbook: six proven scaling archetypes, the role-fit framework, risk controls, and how to treat offshore staffing as a phased capital-allocation strategy.
contact: Speak with a US-based Cloudstaff team member about building your offshore team. Offices in Charlotte, Houston, and Dallas. Call +1 800 730 8615.
